# AI App — Generated by AutoDevStack v1.4

A production-ready AI application scaffold with:
- **Frontend**: Next.js 15 + Tailwind CSS — chat UI
- **Backend**: Node.js + Express — REST API
- **AI Pipeline**: LangChain — chat chains, multi-turn history
- **Integrations**: OpenAI (GPT-4o-mini) + Anthropic (Claude)
- **Database**: PostgreSQL + Prisma ORM
- **Docker**: Full docker-compose setup

## Project Structure

```
├── frontend/          # Next.js chat UI (port 3000)
├── backend/           # Express REST API (port 4000)
├── ai/                # LangChain AI pipeline service (port 5000)
├── prisma/            # Shared Prisma schema
├── docker-compose.yml
└── .env.example
```

## Quick Start

### 1. Set up environment variables

```bash
cp .env.example .env
```

Edit `.env` and set your API keys:
- `OPENAI_API_KEY` — get from https://platform.openai.com/api-keys
- `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` — get from https://console.anthropic.com/settings/keys

### 2. Start with Docker (recommended)

```bash
docker-compose up
```

Services will be available at:
- Frontend: http://localhost:3000
- Backend API: http://localhost:4000
- AI Service: http://localhost:5000

### 3. Or run locally

Install all dependencies:
```bash
npm install
```

Start the database (requires Docker or a local Postgres instance):
```bash
docker run -d -p 5432:5432 \
  -e POSTGRES_USER=postgres \
  -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=postgres \
  -e POSTGRES_DB=aiapp \
  postgres:15-alpine
```

Push the Prisma schema:
```bash
npm run db:push
```

Start all services in parallel:
```bash
npm run dev
```

Or start them individually:
```bash
npm run dev:frontend   # http://localhost:3000
npm run dev:backend    # http://localhost:4000
npm run dev:ai         # http://localhost:5000
```

## Switching AI Provider

The AI service supports both OpenAI and Anthropic. Set `AI_PROVIDER` in your `.env`:

```env
# Use OpenAI (default)
AI_PROVIDER=openai
AI_MODEL=gpt-4o-mini
OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-...

# Use Anthropic
AI_PROVIDER=anthropic
AI_MODEL=claude-3-haiku-20240307
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-...
```

## API Reference

### AI Service (`localhost:5000`)

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| POST | `/api/chat` | Multi-turn chat with session history |
| POST | `/api/chat/complete` | Single-turn completion |
| GET | `/health` | Health check |

### Backend API (`localhost:4000`)

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| POST | `/api/chat` | Proxied chat (forwards to AI service) |
| GET | `/api/users` | List users |
| POST | `/api/users` | Create user |
| GET | `/api/users/:id` | Get user by ID |
| GET | `/health` | Health check |

## Database

Prisma schema lives in `prisma/schema.prisma` and is used by the backend service.

```bash
npm run db:migrate    # Run migrations
npm run db:push       # Push schema without migration
npm run db:studio     # Open Prisma Studio
```

## LangChain Tracing (optional)

Enable LangSmith tracing for observability:

```env
LANGCHAIN_TRACING_V2=true
LANGCHAIN_API_KEY=ls__...
LANGCHAIN_PROJECT=my-ai-app
```
